hero.description: I build accessible, performant interfaces. Currently at Mercado Libre, shipping product at scale across Latin America.

about.headline: I build interfaces that work for everyone.
bio: Front End Developer with 5+ years of experience, specialized in React, TypeScript, and Next.js. Currently at Mercado Libre, engineering the Sell Your Item flow — the core item-publishing product serving millions of daily active users across web, Android, and iOS.

I championed accessibility as a self-driven initiative: audited with Lighthouse and internal ML tooling, defined the improvement roadmap, and raised the team's a11y score by 15%+. I use AI tools daily as part of what I call SDD (Self Driven Development) — a workflow built on autonomy, high standards, and shipping things that last.

items.title: Sell Your Item
items.description: The core item-publishing flow for sellers across Latin America — millions of daily active users across web and mobile webview (Android & iOS). Accessibility became my initiative.
highlights: Championed a11y as a self-driven initiative — auditing with Lighthouse and internal ML tooling, raising the accessibility score by 15%+
Became the go-to accessibility reference within the project, earning team recognition
Monitors production health via New Relic, DataDog, and Kibana; contributes to on-call rotations
Certified Knowledge Multiplier — documenting components and processes to accelerate onboarding
Stack: React, TypeScript, internal Next.js-like framework, Andes design system

items.title: wearerojo.com
items.description: Full website for Rojo, a creative agency — from visual concept and branding to responsive production build. Zero external templates. Full ownership end-to-end.

items.title: Pulse & People
items.description: Website for an HR consultancy focused on SMBs. Warm, modern aesthetic — designed to feel approachable without losing credibility.

bullets: Engineer features for Sell Your Item — the core item-publishing product, serving millions of daily active users across web and mobile webview (Android & iOS)
Championed accessibility as a self-driven initiative: auditing with Lighthouse and internal ML tooling, raising the a11y score by 15%+ and becoming the team's go-to reference
Ensure code quality through Jest unit testing and Storybook component isolation, validating key flows without dedicated QA support
Monitor production health with New Relic, DataDog, and Kibana — contributing to on-call rotations and resolving incidents on critical flows
Leverage AI-assisted development (Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Claude) across the full feature lifecycle via SDD methodology
Certified Knowledge Multiplier — documenting components and processes to accelerate onboarding across IT and Product teams

items.location: Mexico City · Promoted Jr → SSR within 9 months
bullets: Led frontend architecture for an internal HR platform — component structure, API integration, and full feature development from setup to deployment
Built and maintained features for an internal logistics platform using React, Next.js, and Material UI
Mentored two junior developers and produced video tutorials and written documentation to reduce onboarding time
End-to-end projects: visual concept, development, and deployment
Clients in creative agencies and HR consulting

contact.headline: Let's talk.
contact.sub: Open to frontend roles, freelance projects, and interesting conversations. Based in Buenos Aires, available remotely.
